Name: FKeyBind
Description: Struct containing mappings for legacy method of binding keys to exec commands.

Variables.Name: Key
Variables.Description: The key to be bound to the command

Variables.Name: Command
Variables.Description: The command to execute when the key is pressedreleased

Variables.Name: Control
Variables.Description: Whether the control key needs to be held when the key event occurs

Variables.Name: Shift
Variables.Description: Whether the shift key needs to be held when the key event occurs

Variables.Name: Alt
Variables.Description: Whether the alt key needs to be held when the key event occurs

Variables.Name: Cmd
Variables.Description: Whether the command key needs to be held when the key event occurs

Variables.Name: bIgnoreCtrl
Variables.Description: Whether the control key must not be held when the key event occurs

Variables.Name: bIgnoreShift
Variables.Description: Whether the shift key must not be held when the key event occurs

Variables.Name: bIgnoreAlt
Variables.Description: Whether the alt key must not be held when the key event occurs

Variables.Name: bIgnoreCmd
Variables.Description: Whether the command key must not be held when the key event occurs
